# Patch Definitions File
# Format: patch-name.patch|file/path/to/modify.js|Brief description
# Lines starting with # are comments

subtitle-defaults.patch|src/components/subtitlesettings/subtitlesettings.js|Set smart subtitle defaults for new users
cardRatings-default-true.patch|src/scripts/settings/userSettings.js|Enable card ratings by default
itemdetails-null-safety.patch|src/controllers/itemDetails/index.js|Fix null safety errors preventing play button from showing
